items.title: Bootstrap the agents package contract and starter kit.
acceptance: README defines the thick installed-agent contract
schemas, templates, archetypes, and examples exist

items.title: Define the CLI expansion contract for installing Agents.
acceptance: add a reference generator for thick installed-agent output
validate install specs by generating required files

items.title: Draft the future permission-layer interface.
acceptance: identify whether permissions belong in doctrine, constitution, identity, agents, or a new package
items.stop_line: Design only. No runtime authorization, credential, account, or external permission mutation.

items.title: Resolve distribution-only skills into generated vendored copies with provenance.
acceptance: define distribution slug to canonical or generated-copy resolution
preserve risk, review, and license metadata
avoid treating distribution output as authoring source
items.stop_line: No publication, unreviewed skill promotion, or loss of provenance.

extensions.selection_rule: Take the human-assigned item or select the highest-priority dependency-clear ready item allowed by operations/gates.md.
